summary: Completed backend testing of Addrika shipping configuration APIs. All 14 tests passed verifying zone-based free shipping, premium options availability, and RTO voucher configuration.

1_shipping_options_delhi_ncr.details: Returns zone='Delhi NCR', threshold=₹499, premium options available (ships from Delhi)

2_shipping_options_bhagalpur.details: Returns zone='Bhagalpur', threshold=₹249, NO premium options (ships from Bhagalpur)

3_shipping_options_rest_of_india.details: Returns zone='Rest of India', threshold=₹999, premium options available (ships from Delhi)

4_free_shipping_thresholds.details: Returns all 3 thresholds: Bhagalpur=₹249, Delhi NCR=₹499, Rest of India=₹999

5_admin_shipping_config.details: Returns full config with thresholds, premium options (Priority ₹29, Same-Day ₹49), RTO percentage=2.36%, pickup locations

6_update_rto_percentage.details: Successfully updates RTO percentage, validates range 0-50%, persists changes

7_premium_options_not_available_east_ind.details: Verified premium options NOT available for East India pincodes (Kolkata 700001, Ranchi 834001, Bhubaneswar 751001, Bhagalpur 812001) - all ship from Bhagalpur warehouse

8_premium_options_available_delhi_shippe.details: Verified premium options available for Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Chennai - all ship from Delhi warehouse

9_rto_voucher_formula.details: RTO percentage confirmed at 2.36%. Formula: Voucher = Order Amount - (2.36% of Order) - Shipping Charges

10_authentication.details: Admin endpoints correctly require authentication, return 401/403 without valid session

critical_code_review_comments: shipping_config.py: Well-structured zone detection using pincode prefixes
Premium options correctly restricted to Delhi-shipped orders only
RTO voucher calculation formula properly implemented: Order - 2.36% - Shipping
Multi-pickup location logic correctly routes East India orders to Bhagalpur
seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing shipping configuration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shipping configuration fully tested. Key findings: 1) Zone detection working correctly (Bhagalpur 812*, Delhi NCR 110*/201*/122*, Rest of India=default). 2) Free shipping thresholds: Bhagalpur ₹249, Delhi NCR ₹499, Rest of India ₹999. 3) Premium options (Priority ₹29, Same-Day ₹49) only available for Delhi-shipped orders. 4) East India (Bihar, Jharkhand, WB, Odisha) ships from Bhagalpur - no premium options. 5) RTO voucher formula: Order - 2.36% - Shipping.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All shipping configuration endpoints working as expected.
